checks.label: README
checks.why: A clear README is the front door for users and contributors.
checks.fix: Add setup, usage, contribution, support, and project status sections to README.md.

checks.label: License
checks.why: A license tells downstream users what they may legally do with the code.
checks.fix: Add an OSI-approved license file such as MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD-3-Clause, or MPL-2.0.

checks.label: Contributing guide
checks.why: Maintainers get better issues and pull requests when expectations are documented.
checks.fix: Add CONTRIBUTING.md with local setup, test commands, review expectations, and release notes guidance.

checks.label: Security policy
checks.why: Responsible disclosure needs a private, documented path.
checks.fix: Add SECURITY.md with supported versions, reporting instructions, and response expectations.

checks.label: Code of conduct
checks.why: Community norms reduce ambiguity during difficult interactions.
checks.fix: Add CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, for example the Contributor Covenant.

checks.label: Changelog
checks.why: Users need a durable place to understand release impact.
checks.fix: Keep CHANGELOG.md with dated release entries and migration notes.

checks.label: Support policy
checks.why: Support boundaries help maintainers avoid turning every request into unpaid consulting.
checks.fix: Add SUPPORT.md describing where to ask questions, what is in scope, and expected response times.

checks.label: Continuous integration
checks.why: CI catches regressions before maintainers merge changes.
checks.fix: Add a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting and tests on pushes and pull requests.

checks.label: Tests
checks.why: Tests make review safer and lower the cost of outside contributions.
checks.fix: Add focused tests for public behavior and document the test command.

checks.label: Issue templates
checks.why: Issue templates collect the facts maintainers need to reproduce and triage.
checks.fix: Add bug report and feature request templates under .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/.

checks.label: Pull request template
checks.why: PR templates nudge contributors to include tests, docs, and review context.

checks.label: Dependency update automation
checks.why: Automated dependency updates reduce security and compatibility drift.
checks.fix: Add .github/dependabot.yml for the package ecosystems used in the repository.

checks.label: Static security analysis
checks.why: Static analysis finds common vulnerability patterns before releases.
checks.fix: Add a CodeQL or equivalent security scanning workflow.

checks.label: Node package metadata
checks.why: Package metadata makes installation, testing, and release automation discoverable.
checks.fix: Add package.json with name, description, license, scripts, repository, and engines fields.

checks.label: Dependency lockfile
checks.why: Lockfiles make CI and contributor setup reproducible.
checks.fix: Commit the lockfile for application-style projects, or document why this library intentionally omits one.
